name: micro-frontend-monorepo
description: A modern monorepo boilerplate for building scalable micro-frontend applications from scratch — powered by Rspack Module Federation, pnpm Workspaces, and Lerna.

scripts.postinstall: find scripts -type f -exec grep -Il '^#!/usr/bin/env node' {} \; | xargs chmod +x && pnpm --filter @repo/dev-cli build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @repo/host-app lint && pnpm --filter @repo/product-listing-app lint && pnpm --filter @repo/product-details-app lint && pnpm --filter @repo/cart-app lint && pnpm --filter @repo/checkout-app lint && pnpm --filter @repo/user-profile-app lint

author: atul
